ChangeRequest.name: [IReF] Add ISIN to OTC Derivatives
ChangeRequest.comment:
<!--See: documentation on [Issues in GitLab](https://gitlab.sofa.dev/sdd-bird-team/bird-logical-data-model/-/wikis/Issues-in-GitLab)-->
# Overview
IReF is adding the International Securities Identification Number as a requirement for the reporting of Over the Counter (OTC) Derivative instruments. BIRD needs to create a solution for that which is similar in structure to the structure for _Securities_ (see picture)
![image](/uploads/da94ad45559840aa7bc470e7bcdd0d51/image.png){width="707" height="406"}
Current structure for OTC derivatives:
![image.png](/uploads/458e296264e18bf92d503c61852087b7/image.png)
### Contact person
- @Arjan.Bos - @Olivia.Hauet
### Relevant Framework/Template
- IReF
### Additional documentation/links (optional)
ESMA has a Q&A on this specific topic: https://www.esma.europa.eu/sites/default/files/2024-01/ESMA12-766636679-105_Response_to_EC_consultation_OTC_derivative_identifier.pdf
### Before closing checklist
- [ ] Assignee for review - [ ] Assignee to close - [ ] Other actions
